positive: A mystical, stylized forest creature, similar to a griffin or majestic phoenix, rendered in a clean, highly detailed silhouette style. The creature is depicted in a strong, central upward flight pose against a vibrant, ethereal gradient background of deep midnight blue merging into twilight purple. Focus on sharp edges, intricate feather or scale patterns, and a dynamic sense of movement. The artwork should be highly contrasting, almost like a negative space print, with limited color palette accents of luminous gold and teal used for energy effects or glowing elements. Minimal background elements to keep focus on the central figure. Vector art quality, perfect symmetry, highly graphic, fantasy tattoo design, suitable for apparel print, deep contrast, high saturation, illustration style.
negative: blurry, lowres, fuzzy, noisy, artifacts, watermarks, text, logo, watermark, signature, poor composition, extra limbs, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts, grainy
